ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Forward, Defenseman, Goaltender) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the home arena */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into a shootout */,
  "home_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the home team */,
  "away_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_coach_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_coach_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player in the game */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Time on ice (e.g., 20:30) */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player in the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player in the season */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player in the season */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Total number of faceoffs won by the player in the season */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of faceoffs lost by the player in the season */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Total time on ice (e.g., 1500:00) */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of power play goals */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of short-handed goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the game */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the team in the game */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the team in the game */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the team in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the team in the game */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of power play opportunities */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals */,
  "penalty_kill_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of penalty kill opportunities */,
  "penalty_kill_successes" INTEGER /* Number of successful penalty kills */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistics belong to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Total number of power play opportunities in the season */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Total number of power play goals in the season */,
  "penalty_kill_opportunities" INTEGER /* Total number of penalty kill opportunities in the season */,
  "penalty_kill_successes" INTEGER /* Total number of successful penalty kills in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agent signing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the contract, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team transaction */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., hiring coach, firing coach) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel involved in the transaction */,
  "previous_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous personnel (e.g., previous coach) */,
  "new_personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new personnel (e.g., new coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_transactions_previous_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_transactions_new_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_transactions_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the personnel (e.g., head coach, general manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the personnel belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the personnel */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
